title: Rebrand donation site for True Hope Foundation

requirements.text: Update all landing page copy, headings, and descriptive text to reflect True Hope Foundation's mission and the truehopefoundation.in domain, replacing any Gaza-specific references with appropriate humanitarian relief messaging
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays True Hope Foundation branding and mission
All text references appropriate to True Hope Foundation's cause
No references to Gaza or gaza.hdfund.org remain in visible copy
Domain-appropriate messaging throughout the landing page

requirements.text: Generate a new hero banner image suitable for True Hope Foundation's humanitarian relief mission (hero-truehope.dim_1200x600.png) and replace the existing hero image
acceptanceCriteria: New hero banner reflects humanitarian relief theme
Hero banner is displayed on the landing page

requirements.text: Update campaign configuration to set an appropriate fundraising goal for True Hope Foundation
acceptanceCriteria: Campaign goal is updated in frontend/src/config/campaign.ts
Goal amount is appropriate for a humanitarian relief campaign
Progress bar and campaign statistics reflect the new goal

constraints: Maintain the existing donation site structure and functionality
Keep the backend data model unchanged
Preserve all existing donation records and backend APIs
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
nonGoals: Changing the donation form workflow or fields
Modifying the backend architecture or data structure

required: Humanitarian relief hero banner showing hope and community support, warm and uplifting tones (hero-truehope.dim_1200x600.png)
